title: The System Behind Self-Driving: Waymo’s Dmitri Dolgov
content: Waymo delivers hundreds of thousands of fully autonomous rides weekly by building a full system for training, evaluating, and deploying self‑driving vehicles. In an interview, Waymo Co‑CEO Dmitri Dolgov explains how sensor fusion of LiDAR, radar, and cameras, simulation, critic models, and AI decision‑making create true autonomy, distinguishing it from driver‑assist. The discussion also covers global scaling needs and how recent AI advances are shaping the future of autonomous mobility.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (John Collison, Dmitri Dolgov)
eventKey: system-behind-self-driving-waymo’s-dmitri-dolgov
normalizedTitle: the system behind self-driving waymo’s dmitri dolgov
representativeSources: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (John Collison, Dmitri Dolgov)
scoreReasoning: Waymo 高管披露系统级方法，信息具体，对理解自动驾驶技术路线与商业化进程有较高价值。
summary: Waymo delivers hundreds of thousands of fully autonomous rides weekly by building a full system for training, evaluating, and deploying self‑driving vehicles. In an interview, Waymo Co‑CEO Dmitri Dolgov explains how sensor fusion of LiDAR, radar, and cameras, simulation, critic models, and AI decision‑making create true autonomy, distinguishing it from driver‑assist. The discussion also covers global scaling needs and how recent AI advances are shaping the future of autonomous mobility.

title: 受中东和平协议乐观情绪提振，原油价格暴跌，美债走高
content: Oil prices fell sharply while Treasury yields rose, driven by growing optimism about a Middle‑East peace agreement. The market's positive outlook on regional stability lifted demand expectations for crude, pushing prices down, and attracted investors to U.S. government bonds, boosting their yields.

summary: Oil prices fell sharply while Treasury yields rose, driven by growing optimism about a Middle‑East peace agreement. title: 伊朗称霍尔木兹海峡完全畅通，金价跃升至一个月高点
content: Gold prices jumped sharply after Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz was fully open, indicating a potential alleviation of strategic pressure on global oil flow. The news boosted investor sentiment and lifted gold’s value in the market.

title: 印度金融科技企业焦急地敦促Anthropic开放Mythos的访问权限
content: Indian fintech companies are urging Anthropic to grant them access to the Mythos research model. These firms cite the model’s potential to enhance their services and competitiveness. Anthropic has not yet opened the model to the public, leading to growing impatience among the Indian financial sector. The companies’ requests highlight a broader demand for cutting‑edge AI tools in fintech, emphasizing the urgency of accessing newer technologies.
eventKey: 印度金融科技企业焦急地敦促anthropic开放mythos的访问权限

scoreReasoning: Anthropic 模型访问需求信号，反映新兴市场落地压力。但尚无实际开放进展。
summary: Indian fintech companies are urging Anthropic to grant them access to the Mythos research model. These firms cite the model’s potential to enhance their services and competitiveness. The companies’ requests highlight a broader demand for cutting‑edge AI tools in fintech, emphasizing the urgency of accessing newer technologies.

title: 🔥 Solon AI v3.13 发布（智能体开发框架，支持 Java8 到 Java26）
content: Solon AI Solon AI 是一款面向 Java 开发者 的全栈智能体（Agent）应用开发框架。它秉承 Solon 家族一贯的“克制、高效、开放”理念，向上抽象统一接口屏蔽模型差异，向下深度集成向量库、MCP 协议与复杂流控制。 核心理念： 一份代码，跨模型运行…

Solon AI Solon AI 是一款面向 Java 开发者 的全栈智能体（Agent）应用开发框架。它秉承 Solon 家族一贯的“克制、高效、开放”理念，向上抽象统一接口屏蔽模型差异，向下深度集成向量库、MCP 协议与复杂流控制。

title: 能源独立可能会使美国更加咄咄逼人
content: The article argues that achieving energy independence could drive the United States toward a more assertive foreign policy. It suggests that control over domestic energy resources may increase national confidence and influence, potentially leading to more proactive or interventionist actions abroad.

summary: The article argues that achieving energy independence could drive the United States toward a more assertive foreign policy. It suggests that control over domestic energy resources may increase national confidence and influence, potentially leading to more proactive or interventionist actions abroad.

title: 希腊船东派遣迄今为止最大的油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡
content: Greek shipowner launched its largest-ever oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, according to a Bloomberg report. Make‑or‑treat statement. The vessel entered the fully congested waterway, highlighting efforts to maintain oil supply routes amid geopolitical tensions. No further operational details were provided in the article.

title: 据称，罗克已选定承销商，为唐恩都乐母公司筹备20亿美元的美国首次公开募股
